Week 29 supermarket gift-card offers: 15–21 July 2026

Updated 13 July 2026

Coles catalogue offer

10% bonus value on Myer gift cards at Coles

Available in $50 and $100 denominations. Limit 5 per member. Excludes $20 denomination.

Woolworths catalogue offer

20× Everyday Rewards points on Apple gift cards at Woolworths

Variable load from $20–$500. Limit 2 per day. Excludes variable-load business cards.
